query:
-- Add Abdur as founder in caller_profiles (placeholder phone — will be updated when he calls)
INSERT INTO caller_profiles (phone, name, callerRole, shopName, shopCity, shopState, notes, callCount, doNotSell)
VALUES ('+10000000000', 'Abdur', 'founder', 'Baylio HQ', 'New Jersey', 'NJ', 'Founder and CEO of Baylio. Testing the system. Skip the sales pitch entirely. Treat as internal team member.', 0, false)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = 'Abdur', callerRole = 'founder', notes = 'Founder and CEO of Baylio. Testing the system. Skip the sales pitch entirely. Treat as internal team member.';

-- Add Zabir from Autoblitz as a cold prospect
INSERT INTO prospects (ownerName, shopName, address, city, state, zip, prospectSource, outreachStatus, notes)
VALUES ('Zabir', 'Autoblitz', '125 Saddle River Ave', 'South Hackensack', 'NJ', '07606', 'manual', 'not_contacted', 'Real prospect. Owner of Autoblitz auto repair shop. Located at 125 Saddle River Ave, South Hackensack NJ 07606. Priority cold lead for personalized outreach by Alex.');
